read_only_steps.step: Fetch or update EUR_USD S5 bid/ask candles read-only if local coverage is missing.
read_only_steps.command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/oanda_history_fetch.py --pairs EUR_USD --granularities S5 --price BA --days 45 --output-dir logs/replay/oanda_history

read_only_steps.step: Replay forecast history against S5 bid/ask candles with spread included.
read_only_steps.command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/oanda_history_replay_validate.py --pairs EUR_USD --granularity S5 --history-dir logs/replay/oanda_history --output-dir logs/reports/forecast_improvement/eurusd_short_breakout_failure_spread_probe

read_only_steps.step: If the replay is positive, package to a candidate data artifact only; do not overwrite runtime rules or relax gates.

failure_condition: Replay stays missing, partial, rank-only, daily-unstable, or negative.
The positive replay applies to a different side, method, order type, TP/SL geometry, or non-HARVEST vehicle.
A command would overwrite runtime rules or relax live gates.

sample_acquisition_plan.question_1_existing_history_available: Current artifacts do not prove that the remaining 3 samples already exist. The authoritative current count is 17 TAKE_PROFIT_ORDER wins and 0 TP losses.

read_only_existing_history_check.goal: Find only already-existing exact broker/legacy history that was not counted; do not create live samples.
commands: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m quant_rabbit.cli payoff-shape-diagnosis --output data/payoff_shape_diagnosis.json --report docs/payoff_shape_diagnosis_report.md

sample_acquisition_plan.question_2_if_existing_history_is_insuff: No live-SCOUTless method can create new true broker TAKE_PROFIT_ORDER samples. Without uncounted existing history, the sample gap remains. Replay/paper evidence can support spread proof and month-scale diagnosis, but it cannot be counted as the remaining 3 broker TP samples.
do_not_count_as_samples: same shape with MARKET, failed-side STOP chase, or RUNNER_NO_BROKER_TP vehicle

month_scale_replay_plan.question_5_room_to_resolve: There is limited room because the target shape currently has no direct month-scale blocker. That is not clearance: global replay remains negative and must become non-blocking, or a refreshed acceptance artifact must prove the exact target HARVEST exception is not blocked without hiding global loss evidence.

read_only_steps.step: Refresh the 744h timing replay window without shortening it.
Recompute capture economics and acceptance against the refreshed replay.
read_only_steps.command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m quant_rabbit.cli capture-economics && PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m quant_rabbit.cli profitability-acceptance

read_only_steps.step: Regenerate payoff diagnosis to confirm whether the target has a direct blocker.
read_only_steps.command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m quant_rabbit.cli payoff-shape-diagnosis --output data/payoff_shape_diagnosis.json --report docs/payoff_shape_diagnosis_report.md

failure_condition: Global month-scale replay remains blocking with no exact target exception path.
A direct EUR_USD SHORT BREAKOUT_FAILURE residual blocker appears.
The replay improvement depends on market-close exits rather than attached TP/HARVEST proof.

market_close_leak_plan.question_4_cut: Cut the shape into attached broker TP/HARVEST proof versus MARKET_ORDER_TRADE_CLOSE leakage. The proof path may keep the 17/0 TP bucket; it must exclude the 10 market-close losses and must not plan any cancel/close/market-exit action.

read_only_steps.step: Refresh execution timing audit and identify whether any loss-side market closes are contained-risk or premature.
Rebuild payoff diagnosis and verify the target TP bucket stays positive after market closes are excluded.
read_only_steps.command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m quant_rabbit.cli payoff-shape-diagnosis --output data/payoff_shape_diagnosis.json --report docs/payoff_shape_diagnosis_report.md

failure_condition: Any proof path counts MARKET_ORDER_TRADE_CLOSE as a positive sample.
Market-close leakage remains active and uncontained.
Partial TP plus runner is treated as permission instead of diagnostic replay.

question_6_transition.reason: Evidence completion can remove the more-evidence classification, but it cannot synthesize operator clearance, GPT receipt, fresh broker truth, RiskEngine pass, or LiveOrderGateway permission.

do_not_do: Do not stage a live order from this plan.
Do not modify TP or SL.
Do not load, reload, start, stop, or edit launchd agents.
Do not lower the proof floor below 20.
Do not hide month-scale replay negatives.
Do not derive lot size from remaining_to_4x or any 4x deficit.
Do not invent an operator decision.
Do not print, copy, or persist secrets or tokens.
Do not overwrite runtime bidask rules from a candidate replay artifact without a separate reviewed code change.
Do not treat proof_queue_count=0, mathematical 4x firepower, or replay support as live permission.
